| Question                                   | Answer                                                 |
|--------------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------|
| Release branch?                            | release-vX.Y.Z                                         |
| Description?                               | Provide a detailed description. What? How? Where?      |
| Type?                                      | Bugfix / Improvement / Implementation                  |
| PrestaShop side                            | FO / BO / BOTH                                         |
| Deprecations?                              | Yes / No                                               |
| How to test?                               | How? Where? When? What?                                |
| Which issue fixed? Assigned ticket on Jira | [SL-XXX](https://invertus.atlassian.net/browse/SL-XXX) |
| Related PRs (similar)                      | #XXX                                                   |
